category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a version control system; official Apache Subversion docs identify it as Apache Subversion.
display_name_sources: Official subversion.apache.org documentation uses the name Apache Subversion; source_facts.homepage is the Apache Subversion site.
docs_sources: Official Apache Subversion documentation page on subversion.apache.org.
repo_sources: Official Apache Subversion source-code page says the source is in the ASF Subversion repository and gives the trunk checkout URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; source_facts.executables lists svn command-line tools; official Apache Subversion project identity.
